tagline: Trusted Legal Counsel for Business & Beyond
hero_subtitle: Strategic, results-driven legal representation for businesses and individuals. We combine deep expertise with a client-first approach to protect what matters most.
address: 233 S Wacker Dr, Suite 4200, Chicago, IL 60606
service_area_description: Serving Chicago, Evanston, Oak Brook, Naperville & surrounding areas.
services_subtitle: Comprehensive legal services for businesses and individuals across all major practice areas.
reviews_subtitle: Trusted by businesses and individuals across the greater Chicago area.
cta_subtitle: Schedule a free consultation. We'll review your case and outline a clear path forward.
footer_description: Experienced legal counsel serving Chicago's business community. Committed to integrity, excellence, and client success.

services_featured.name: Corporate Law
services_featured.description: Full-service corporate counsel for formations, governance, M&A, and regulatory compliance.

services_secondary.name: Contract Law
services_secondary.description: Drafting, reviewing, and negotiating contracts that protect your interests and minimize risk.

services_accent.name: Urgent Legal Matters
services_accent.description: Time-sensitive injunctions, restraining orders, and emergency court filings when you need them most.

services_wide.name: Civil Litigation
services_wide.description: Aggressive, strategic representation in commercial disputes, employment matters, and complex litigation.

about_features.title: Chicago Roots
about_features.description: Based in the heart of Chicago's legal district. We understand the local courts, regulations, and business landscape inside and out.

about_features.title: Proven Track Record
about_features.description: Over two decades of successful outcomes. Our attorneys are recognized by Super Lawyers, Martindale-Hubbell, and Best Lawyers in America.

about_features.title: Client-First Approach
about_features.description: Every case gets a dedicated team. We provide transparent billing, regular updates, and strategic counsel tailored to your specific goals.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Hartwell & Associates guided our startup through a complex Series A financing. Their attention to detail saved us from several costly pitfalls.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: When our business faced a breach of contract dispute, they assembled a strategy that resolved it favorably in under 90 days. Exceptional work.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Professional, responsive, and genuinely invested in our success. They've been our go-to firm for five years and counting.
